name: forum-seed
description: Flood the forum with realistic test data. Generates threads across all boards and fills each with replies so every pagination control is exercisable.

options.name: threads
options.help: Total threads to insert across all boards (default 200)

options.name: replies
options.help: Max replies per thread (actual count varies 50..N, default 60)

steps.text: [forum-seed] Generating {opt.threads} threads, up to {opt.replies} replies each...

steps.command: docker compose exec -T db psql -U nextra -d nextra_db < /tmp/forum_seed.sql

steps.text: [forum-seed] Done. Visit http://localhost:8889/app/en/forum to see the results.
